code: export class GangMembersParser{constructor(){this._members=[];}flush(){this._members=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;const count=wrapper.readInt();const list=new Array(count);for(let i=0;i<count;i++){list[i]={userId:wrapper.readInt(),username:wrapper.readString(),rankId:wrapper.readInt(),rankName:wrapper.readString(),figure:wrapper.readString()};}this._members=list;return true;}get members(){return this._members;}}
